recentNews.headline: eGain Reports Q3 FY2026 Results: Revenue +7% to $22.5M, GAAP Net Income $2.4M, AI Knowledge Hub ARR +26%
recentNews.whyItMatters: Profitability inflected sharply (adj. EBITDA margin 14% vs 6% y/y; GAAP EPS $0.09 vs $0.00) as the AI Knowledge Hub becomes the growth engine - its ARR grew 26% to $48.0M and now contributes 64% of total SaaS ARR. Management flagged a doubling of RFP activity, mostly from U.S. Fortune 1000 banking, insurance and healthcare.

recentNews.headline: eGain Launches AI Agent IVA for Conversational, Natural-Language Customer Service
recentNews.whyItMatters: Extends eGain's AI Agent line into intelligent virtual agents that replace scripted menus with governed-knowledge-grounded conversation - broadening the addressable use cases for the AI Knowledge Hub platform in front-line self-service.

recentNews.headline: eGain Launches Agentic Studio with Multi-Agent Orchestration
recentNews.whyItMatters: Agentic Studio coordinates multiple AI agents via MCP and A2A protocols to autonomously resolve complex requests end-to-end, with actions grounded in policy-compliant knowledge - positioning eGain in the emerging agentic-AI/orchestration layer rather than just knowledge retrieval.

recentNews.headline: eGain Announces Enterprise AI Platform Connectors for Microsoft Copilot, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, and Cursor
recentNews.whyItMatters: Repositions eGain as the governed knowledge layer feeding third-party AI platforms and agentic IDEs - a strategic 'arms dealer' move that makes the Knowledge Hub a system of record for accurate, compliant content across the broader AI ecosystem rather than a standalone CX tool.

recentNews.headline: eGain Launches AI Knowledge Suite for Retail Banking
recentNews.whyItMatters: A vertical-specific bundle (guided needs-based sales, AscentAI regulatory-compliance automation, HERE enterprise browser) targeting community/regional banks and credit unions - directly aligned with the banking/insurance demand surge management cited on the Q3 call.

recentNews.headline: eGain Announces Q2 FY2026 Financial Results
recentNews.whyItMatters: Mid-year checkpoint on the SaaS/AI transition ahead of the strong Q3 print; the 8-K is the primary filing documenting the quarter's revenue, margins and ARR trajectory used to track the company's AI-led re-acceleration.

recentNews.headline: Achmea Selects eGain AI Knowledge Hub and AI Agent to Power Digital Transformation
recentNews.whyItMatters: Marquee enterprise win - one of Europe's largest cooperative insurers - deploying eGain across ~21,000 users (8,225 contact-center + 12,750 enterprise) with an AI Agent license each, integrating 26,000+ documents. A large per-seat AI Agent expansion that validates the land-and-expand motion in regulated European financial services.

recentNews.headline: eGain Expands Stock Repurchase Program by $20M to $60M Aggregate (with Q4/FY2025 Results)
recentNews.whyItMatters: Capital-return signal: board lifted the buyback authorization from $40M to $60M after repurchasing ~$39.8M, underscoring management's confidence and shareholder-return focus while the AI transition plays out.
